examples.title: M8 Flat Washer
examples.prompt: Flat washer for M8 bolts: 24mm outer diameter, 8.4mm bore, 2mm thick
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

od = 24
bore_dia = 8.4
thickness = 2

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).circle(od).extrude(thickness)
part -= Hole(bore_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("M8_bore")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Pipe Flange DN40
examples.prompt: Pipe flange, 150mm outer diameter, 12mm thick, 48mm center bore, four M16 bolt holes (17.5mm) on 110mm PCD
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

flange_dia = 150
thickness = 12
bore_dia = 48
bolt_dia = 17.5
bolt_pcd = 110
bolt_count = 4

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).circle(flange_dia).extrude(thickness)

part -= Hole(bore_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("pipe_bore")
part -= Hole(bolt_dia).at_circular(bolt_pcd / 2, count=bolt_count, start_angle=0).through().label("M16_mount")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: NEMA 17 Motor Mount
examples.prompt: NEMA 17 stepper motor mounting plate: 60mm square, 6mm thick, 4mm corner radius, 22.5mm center bore, four M3 holes (3.4mm) on 31mm PCD at 45 degrees
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

plate_size = 60
thickness = 6
corner_r = 4
bore_dia = 22.5
bolt_dia = 3.4
bolt_pcd = 31

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).rounded_rect(plate_size, plate_size, corner_r).extrude(thickness)

part -= Hole(bore_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("shaft_bore")
part -= Hole(bolt_dia).at_circular(bolt_pcd / 2, count=4, start_angle=45).through().label("M3_mount")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: NEMA 23 Motor Mount
examples.prompt: NEMA 23 stepper motor mount: 80mm square plate, 8mm thick, 5mm corner radius, 38.5mm center bore, four M5 clearance holes (5.5mm) on 66.7mm PCD at 45 degrees
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

plate_size = 80
thickness = 8
corner_r = 5
bore_dia = 38.5
bolt_dia = 5.5
bolt_pcd = 66.7

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).rounded_rect(plate_size, plate_size, corner_r).extrude(thickness)

part -= Hole(bore_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("shaft_bore")
part -= Hole(bolt_dia).at_circular(bolt_pcd / 2, count=4, start_angle=45).through().label("M5_mount")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Mounting Plate 120x80
examples.prompt: Mounting plate 120x80mm, 6mm thick, four M5 clearance holes (5.5mm) inset 10mm from each corner
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

plate_w = 120
plate_h = 80
thickness = 6
hole_dia = 5.5
inset = 10

hole_x = plate_w / 2 - inset
hole_y = plate_h / 2 - inset

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).rect(plate_w, plate_h).extrude(thickness)

part -= (
    Hole(hole_dia)
    .at(-hole_x, -hole_y)
    .at(hole_x, -hole_y)
    .at(-hole_x, hole_y)
    .at(hole_x, hole_y)
    .through()
    .label("M5_corner")
)

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Raspberry Pi 4 Mount
examples.prompt: Raspberry Pi 4 mounting plate: 92x62mm, 4mm thick, 3mm corner radius, four 2.7mm holes for M2.5 standoffs in a 58x49mm rectangle pattern centered on the plate
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

plate_w = 92
plate_h = 62
thickness = 4
corner_r = 3
hole_dia = 2.7
hole_rect_w = 58
hole_rect_h = 49

hole_x = (plate_w - hole_rect_w) / 2
hole_y = (plate_h - hole_rect_h) / 2

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).rounded_rect(plate_w, plate_h, corner_r).extrude(thickness)

part -= (
    Hole(hole_dia)
    .at(-hole_x, -hole_y)
    .at(hole_x, -hole_y)
    .at(-hole_x, hole_y)
    .at(hole_x, hole_y)
    .through()
    .label("M2.5_mount")
)

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Soft Jaw Blank
examples.prompt: Vise soft jaw blank 100x50mm, 20mm thick, 6mm fillet on the vertical edges, two M6 clearance holes (6.6mm) spaced 60mm apart on the horizontal center line
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

jaw_w = 100
jaw_h = 50
thickness = 20
fillet_r = 6
bolt_dia = 6.6
bolt_spacing = 60

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).rect(jaw_w, jaw_h).extrude(thickness)
part.fillet(fillet_r, edges="vertical")

hole_x = bolt_spacing / 2
part -= (
    Hole(bolt_dia)
    .at(-hole_x, 0)
    .at(hole_x, 0)
    .through()
    .label("M6_clearance")
)

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Electronics Enclosure
examples.prompt: Electronics enclosure base 100x64mm, 25mm tall, 4mm corner radius, hollowed out with 2.5mm walls and an open top
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

base_w = 100
base_h = 64
base_t = 25
corner_r = 4
wall_t = 2.5

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).rounded_rect(base_w, base_h, corner_r).extrude(base_t)
part = part.shell(wall_t, open_face="top")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: 6202 Bearing Housing
examples.prompt: Flanged bearing housing for a 6202 bearing: 55mm diameter base 6mm thick, 40mm diameter boss 12mm tall on top, 35mm bore through everything, four M4 holes (4.5mm) on 46mm PCD
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

base_dia = 55
base_h = 6
boss_dia = 40
boss_h = 12
bore_dia = 15  # 6202 bearing inner diameter
bearing_bore_dia = 35  # through everything
bolt_dia = 4.5
bolt_pcd = 46

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).circle(base_dia).extrude(base_h)
boss = Sketch(Plane.XY, offset=base_h).circle(boss_dia).extrude(boss_h)
part += boss

part -= Hole(bearing_bore_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("bearing_bore")
part -= Hole(bolt_dia).at_circular(bolt_pcd / 2, count=4, start_angle=0).through().label("M4_mount")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Counterbored Plate
examples.prompt: Square plate 60x60mm, 10mm thick, with a central counterbored hole for an M6 socket head cap screw: 11mm counterbore 6.5mm deep, then 6.6mm clearance hole through
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

plate_size = 60
thickness = 10
counterbore_dia = 11
counterbore_depth = 6.5
clearance_dia = 6.6

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).rect(plate_size, plate_size).extrude(thickness)

part -= Hole(counterbore_dia).at(0, 0).to_depth(counterbore_depth)
part -= Hole(clearance_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("M6_socket_head")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Orifice Plate
examples.prompt: Orifice plate 90mm outer diameter, 3mm thick, 8mm center orifice, four M8 bolt holes (8.4mm) on 70mm PCD
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

plate_dia = 90
thickness = 3
orifice_dia = 8
bolt_dia = 8.4
bolt_pcd = 70
bolt_count = 4

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).circle(plate_dia).extrude(thickness)

part -= Hole(orifice_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("orifice")
part -= Hole(bolt_dia).at_circular(bolt_pcd / 2, count=bolt_count, start_angle=0).through().label("M8_mount")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Stepped Spacer
examples.prompt: Stepped spacer: 30mm diameter base 8mm tall, 20mm diameter upper section 12mm tall on top, 8.4mm bore through for an M8 bolt
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

base_dia = 30
base_h = 8
upper_dia = 20
upper_h = 12
bore_dia = 8.4

base = Sketch(Plane.XY).circle(base_dia).extrude(base_h)
upper = Sketch(Plane.XY, offset=base_h).circle(upper_dia).extrude(upper_h)
part = base 
part += upper

part -= Hole(bore_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("M8_bore")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Flange Gasket
examples.prompt: Flange gasket: 120mm outer diameter, 60mm inner bore, 1.5mm thick, eight M10 bolt holes (10.5mm) on 95mm PCD
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

od = 120
id = 60
thickness = 1.5
bolt_dia = 10.5
bolt_pcd = 95
bolt_count = 8

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).circle(od).extrude(thickness)
part -= Hole(id).at(0, 0).through().label("inner_bore")

part -= Hole(bolt_dia).at_circular(bolt_pcd / 2, count=bolt_count, start_angle=0).through().label("M10_mount")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Speaker Grille
examples.prompt: Speaker grille disc 80mm diameter, 2mm thick, with a 6mm center hole and three rings of 5mm holes: 6 holes on 20mm PCD, 12 holes on 40mm PCD, 16 holes on 60mm PCD
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

disc_dia = 80
thickness = 2
center_hole = 6
hole_dia = 5
pcd1 = 20
pcd2 = 40
pcd3 = 60
count1 = 6
count2 = 12
count3 = 16

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).circle(disc_dia).extrude(thickness)

part -= Hole(center_hole).at(0, 0).through().label("center_hole")
part -= Hole(hole_dia).at_circular(pcd1 / 2, count=count1, start_angle=0).through().label("ring1")
part -= Hole(hole_dia).at_circular(pcd2 / 2, count=count2, start_angle=0).through().label("ring2")
part -= Hole(hole_dia).at_circular(pcd3 / 2, count=count3, start_angle=0).through().label("ring3")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Shaft Collar Blank
examples.prompt: Shaft collar blank: 32mm outer diameter, 10mm wide, 12mm bore, 0.5mm chamfer on the top and bottom edges
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

od = 32
width = 10
bore_dia = 12
chamfer_d = 0.5

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).circle(od).extrude(width)

part -= Hole(bore_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("shaft_bore")
part.chamfer(chamfer_d, edges="all")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: 2020 Extrusion End Cap
examples.prompt: End cap plate for 2020 aluminium extrusion: 20x20mm, 4mm thick, 2mm corner radius, single M5 clearance hole (5.5mm) in the center
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

plate_size = 20
thickness = 4
corner_r = 2
bolt_dia = 5.5

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).rounded_rect(plate_size, plate_size, corner_r).extrude(thickness)
part -= Hole(bolt_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("M5_clearance")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Drill Jig Plate
examples.prompt: Drill jig plate 100x40mm, 8mm thick, with a row of five 6mm holes spaced 18mm apart along the horizontal center line, pattern centered on the plate
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

plate_w = 100
plate_h = 40
thickness = 8
hole_dia = 6
hole_spacing = 18
hole_count = 5

hole_x = [-(hole_count - 1) * hole_spacing / 2 + i * hole_spacing for i in range(hole_count)]

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).rect(plate_w, plate_h).extrude(thickness)

for x in hole_x:
    part -= Hole(hole_dia).at(x, 0).through()

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Cable Gland Plate
examples.prompt: Electrical panel gland plate 110x70mm, 3mm thick, three 20.4mm holes for M20 cable glands spaced 30mm apart along the horizontal center line, four M4 corner holes (4.5mm) inset 6mm
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

plate_w = 110
plate_h = 70
thickness = 3
gland_dia = 20.4
gland_spacing = 30
bolt_dia = 4.5
inset = 6

gland_x = [-gland_spacing / 2, 0, gland_spacing / 2]
gland_y = [0, 0, 0]
bolt_x = [-plate_w / 2 + inset, plate_w / 2 - inset, -plate_w / 2 + inset, plate_w / 2 - inset]
bolt_y = [-plate_h / 2 + inset, -plate_h / 2 + inset, plate_h / 2 - inset, plate_h / 2 - inset]

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).rect(plate_w, plate_h).extrude(thickness)

part -= (
    Hole(gland_dia)
    .at(gland_x[0], gland_y[0])
    .at(gland_x[1], gland_y[1])
    .at(gland_x[2], gland_y[2])
    .through()
    .label("cable_gland")
)
part -= (
    Hole(bolt_dia)
    .at(bolt_x[0], bolt_y[0])
    .at(bolt_x[1], bolt_y[1])
    .at(bolt_x[2], bolt_y[2])
    .at(bolt_x[3], bolt_y[3])
    .through()
    .label("M4_corner")
)

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Pulley Blank
examples.prompt: Pulley blank: 70mm diameter disc 15mm thick, 30mm diameter hub boss 8mm tall on top, 10mm center bore through, six 12mm lightening holes on 44mm PCD
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

disc_dia = 70
disc_h = 15
boss_dia = 30
boss_h = 8
bore_dia = 10
lightening_dia = 12
lightening_pcd = 44
lightening_count = 6

disc = Sketch(Plane.XY).circle(disc_dia).extrude(disc_h)
boss = Sketch(Plane.XY, offset=disc_h).circle(boss_dia).extrude(boss_h)
part = disc + boss

part -= Hole(bore_dia).at(0, 0).through().label("center_bore")
part -= Hole(lightening_dia).at_circular(lightening_pcd / 2, count=lightening_count, start_angle=0).through().label("lightening_holes")

export(part, "part.step")

examples.title: Lamp Base
examples.prompt: Round lamp base 140mm diameter, 12mm thick, 2mm chamfer on the top edge, 8mm cable hole offset 50mm from center, three M4 holes (4.5mm) on 120mm PCD
examples.ofl_code:
from orionflow_ofl import *

base_dia = 140
thickness = 12
chamfer_d = 2
cable_hole_dia = 8
cable_offset = 50
bolt_dia = 4.5
bolt_pcd = 120

part = Sketch(Plane.XY).circle(base_dia).extrude(thickness)
part.chamfer(chamfer_d, edges="top")

part -= Hole(cable_hole_dia).at(cable_offset, 0).through().label("cable_entry")
part -= Hole(bolt_dia).at_circular(bolt_pcd / 2, count=3, start_angle=0).through().label("M4_mount")

export(part, "part.step")
